TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dwight Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 12, Dwight Anderson, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Dwight Anderson htagan beh sa 'h'co taytung.tmasot pqwasan biru beh taytung los gocyu. 1978-1980 kawas maki kngci hopa pqwasan biru. 1981-1982 kawas maki ngacyaco hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʔħʔʦ~ʨo tajtuŋ.tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ tajtuŋ los~ɕ ɣoʦ~ʨju. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki kŋʦ~ʨi ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki ŋaʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Dwight Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 12, Dwight Anderson, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Dwight Anderson htagan beh sa 'h'co taytung.tmasot pqwasan biru beh taytung los gocyu. 1978-1980 kawas maki kngci hopa pqwasan biru. 1981-1982 kawas maki ngacyaco hopa pqwasan biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qjanux na ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru *wiɣħt an*ers~ɕon ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa ʔħʔʦ~ʨo tajtuŋ.tmas~ɕot pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ tajtuŋ los~ɕ ɣoʦ~ʨju. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki kŋʦ~ʨi ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ maki ŋaʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
